notes: Solid breakout implementation with proper ball physics, brick collision, lives/scoring, and level progression, but the launch angle (240-300 degrees) sends the ball downward initially which is a minor logic issue, and visual presentation is functional but basic.
An excellent, fully-featured Breakout clone with sound, smooth controls, and proper collision physics; the only minor flaw is that the brick grid is slightly off-center visually.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout clone, but collision handling and level progression are simplistic enough to prevent a top-tier score.
